query:
INSERT INTO public.questions (
    id, question_text, question_type, options, correct_answer, explanation, hint,
    stimulus_text, stimulus_type, section, topic, difficulty, exam_type,
    is_platform_question, ai_generated, calculator_allowed, subject, subtopic,
    math_domain, pool_key, diagnostic_eligible, tags, external_id, source, source_metadata
  ) VALUES
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'Which choice best states the main idea of the text?',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"The narrator remembers a trip he took and admits to getting lost.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"The narrator recalls fond memories of a journey that he took through some beautiful river counties.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"The narrator describes what he saw during a long trip through a frequently visited location.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"The narrator explains the difficulties he encountered on a trip and how he overcame them.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'A',
    'Choice A is the best answer. The narrator is “embarrassed” about the route he took, which ends up leaving him lost and confused about how to get to his destination for the evening. Choice B is incorrect. This choice doesn’t match the passage. The narrator is embarrassed, rather than fond, and he doesn’t describe the beauty of the place. Choice C is incorrect. This choice doesn’t match the passage. We don’t know from this excerpt whether or not the narrator has visited this part of New York multiple times. Choice D is incorrect. This choice doesn’t match the passage. The narrator doesn’t explain how he overcame being lost in this excerpt.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'During a pedestrian trip last summer, through one or two of the river counties of New York, I found myself, as the day declined, somewhat embarrassed about the road I was pursuing. The land undulated very remarkably; and my path, for the last hour, had wound about and about so confusedly, in its effort to keep in the valleys, that I no longer knew in what direction lay the sweet village of B——, where I had determined to stop for the night.',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Information and Ideas',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Information and Ideas',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Information and Ideas']::text[],
    'e677fa6c',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Information and Ideas","section":"english"}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'The author’s primary purpose in this passage is to',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"present scientific evidence that animals can experience emotions.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"argue for the importance of human empathy for other species.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"describe the challenges of understanding animal communication.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"explain how human behavior can be detrimental to animals.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'B',
    'The main idea of the passage is that humans should strive to be more empathetic in their interactions with other species. The passage suggests that humans should try to understand the perspective of other species, and the author uses examples of animals’ behavior to illustrate this point. The author is not arguing that animals can experience emotions, describing the challenges of understanding animal communication, or explaining how human behavior can be detrimental to animals.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The author of the passage is arguing that humans should strive to be more empathetic in their interactions with other species. The passage suggests that humans should try to understand the perspective of other species, and the author uses examples of animals’ behavior to illustrate this point. What is the main idea of the passage?',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Expression of Ideas',
    'medium'::difficulty,

    true,

  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'Which choice best corrects the punctuation error in the passage?',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"The author of this book is a leading expert in the field of artificial intelligence, and his work has been widely praised by critics. In his book, he examines the ethical implications of AI, arguing that it is not just a technological tool, but a force that will shape the future of humanity. However, he also warns that AI has the potential to be used for malicious purposes, and that we must be careful to ensure that it is developed and used responsibly.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"The author of this book is a leading expert in the field of artificial intelligence, and his work has been widely praised by critics. In his book he examines the ethical implications of AI, arguing that it is not just a technological tool, but a force that will shape the future of humanity. However, he also warns that AI has the potential to be used for malicious purposes, and that we must be careful to ensure that it is developed and used responsibly.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"The author of this book is a leading expert in the field of artificial intelligence, and his work has been widely praised by critics. In his book, he examines the ethical implications of AI, arguing that it is not just a technological tool, but a force that will shape the future of humanity. However, he also warns that AI has the potential to be used for malicious purposes, and that we must be careful to ensure that it is developed and used responsibly.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"The author of this book is a leading expert in the field of artificial intelligence, and his work has been widely praised by critics. In his book, he examines the ethical implications of AI, arguing that it is not just a technological tool, but a force that will shape the future of humanity.  However, he also warns that AI has the potential to be used for malicious purposes, and that we must be careful to ensure that it is developed and used responsibly.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'C',
    'The sentence contains a comma splice, where two independent clauses are incorrectly joined together by a comma. To correct this error, the comma should be replaced with a semicolon, which separates two independent clauses without a coordinating conjunction.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The author of this book is a leading expert in the field of artificial intelligence, and his work has been widely praised by critics.  In his book, he examines the ethical implications of AI, arguing that it is not just a technological tool, but a force that will shape the future of humanity.  However, he also warns that AI has the potential to be used for malicious purposes, and that we must be careful to ensure that it is developed and used responsibly.',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',

(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'In this passage, the phrase "not only…but also" is used to',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"create a sense of humor and lightheartedness.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"describe the speaker’s feelings and experiences.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"emphasize the importance of the speaker’s message.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"suggest that the speaker is addressing a large audience.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'C',
    'The phrase "not only…but also" is a common rhetorical device that emphasizes the connection between two ideas. In this passage, it is used to emphasize the importance of making connections between seemingly unrelated subjects.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The text focuses on the importance of making connections between seemingly unrelated subjects. This point is emphasized by the use of the phrase "not only…but also" in the first sentence, which suggests a connection between science and art. The text goes on to give examples of how the two subjects can be intertwined and to highlight the benefits of exploring these connections.',
    'passage',

(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'Which choice provides the best way to combine the sentences in the underlined portion of the passage into a single grammatically correct sentence?',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"The process of photosynthesis isn’t limited to just producing glucose, but plants also produce other important compounds, including oxygen, and the mechanism by which plants use sunlight to make glucose and oxygen is known as Photosystem II.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"The process of photosynthesis isn’t limited to just producing glucose, but plants also produce other important compounds, including oxygen; the mechanism by which plants use sunlight to make glucose and oxygen is known as Photosystem II.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"The process of photosynthesis isn’t limited to just producing glucose, but plants also produce other important compounds, including oxygen, the mechanism by which plants use sunlight to make glucose and oxygen is known as Photosystem II.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"The process of photosynthesis isn’t limited to just producing glucose, but plants also produce other important compounds, including oxygen; the mechanism by which plants use sunlight to make glucose and oxygen is known as Photosystem II, which","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'A',
    'The best way to combine the sentences into a single grammatically correct sentence is to use the coordinating conjunction “and” to connect the independent clauses, since this choice includes the necessary punctuation.  The other choices are incorrect because they either use incorrect punctuation, create a comma splice, or result in a run-on sentence.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The process of photosynthesis is a complex one. Plants use sunlight to convert carbon dioxide and water into glucose, a type of sugar that fuels their growth.  However, the process of photosynthesis isn’t limited to just producing glucose.  Plants also produce other important compounds, including oxygen.  The mechanism by which plants use sunlight to make glucose and oxygen is known as Photosystem II.  The enzyme that drives Photosystem II is called Photosystem II, which absorbs energy-giving electrons from water molecules.',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,

  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'Which choice best corrects the punctuation error in the passage?',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"The young girl, who was only eight years old, was very shy but she loved to read. She was especially fond of fairy tales, and she would spend hours lost in the magical worlds of princesses and dragons. Her favorite story was about a princess who was trapped in a tower by a wicked witch, but who was eventually rescued by a brave knight. The princess, whose hair was as black as night, was very beautiful. She was kind and compassionate, and she always treated others with respect.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"The young girl, who was only eight years old, was very shy, but she loved to read. She was especially fond of fairy tales, and she would spend hours lost in the magical worlds of princesses and dragons. Her favorite story was about a princess who was trapped in a tower by a wicked witch, but who was eventually rescued by a brave knight. The princess whose hair was as black as night, was very beautiful. She was kind and compassionate, and she always treated others with respect.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"The young girl, who was only eight years old, was very shy, but she loved to read. She was especially fond of fairy tales, and she would spend hours lost in the magical worlds of princesses and dragons. Her favorite story was about a princess who was trapped in a tower by a wicked witch, but who was eventually rescued by a brave knight. The princess, whose hair was as black as night, was very beautiful. She was kind and compassionate and she always treated others with respect.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"The young girl, who was only eight years old, was very shy, but she loved to read. She was especially fond of fairy tales, and she would spend hours lost in the magical worlds of princesses and dragons. Her favorite story was about a princess who was trapped in a tower by a wicked witch, but who was eventually rescued by a brave knight. The princess, whose hair was as black as night, was very beautiful, she was kind and compassionate, and she always treated others with respect.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'C',
    'The sentence "The princess, whose hair was as black as night, was very beautiful. She was kind and compassionate, and she always treated others with respect." has a comma splice error, meaning it has two independent clauses joined together with only a comma. The correct way to fix this error is to replace the comma before "and" with a conjunction like "and" or a semicolon.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The young girl, who was only eight years old, was very shy, but she loved to read. She was especially fond of fairy tales, and she would spend hours lost in the magical worlds of princesses and dragons. Her favorite story was about a princess who was trapped in a tower by a wicked witch, but who was eventually rescued by a brave knight. The princess, whose hair was as black as night, was very beautiful. She was kind and compassionate, and she always treated others with respect.',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,

  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'In this passage, the word "resolute" is used to',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"foreshadow the character’s ultimate demise.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"highlight the character’s determination in the face of fear.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"reveal the character’s underlying vulnerability.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"underscore the character’s growing detachment from reality.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'B',
    'The word "resolute" describes a determined and unwavering attitude.  The text suggests that the character is trying to overcome his fears, which is why the writer uses the word "resolute" to highlight the character’s determination in the face of fear.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'In the excerpt, the word ''resolute'' is used to emphasize the way in which the character, the protagonist of the novel, is trying to overcome his fears, however, the character’s inner turmoil is still very much present and the word ''resolute'' is used to show how the character is attempting to suppress that turmoil. What is the most likely reason why the writer uses the word ''resolute''?',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Craft and Structure',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',

  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'The author likely included the example of Grace Hopper to',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"provide a counterargument to the idea that the history of computer development is a straightforward progression.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"highlight the importance of Hopper’s invention in the development of computer programming.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"illustrate that the development of computers was a collaborative effort.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"emphasize the difficulty of learning to program in low-level languages.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'C',
    'The author includes the example of Grace Hopper to show that the development of computers was a collaborative effort, not a linear progression. The passage suggests that the development of computers was driven by a series of innovations, but the author points out that the story of those innovations is incomplete without considering the contributions of women like Grace Hopper. Thus, the author is showing that the development of computers was a collaborative effort, not a straightforward progression. Thus, the author includes Hopper’s work to illustrate that the development of computers was a collaborative effort.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The history of the development of computers is often told as a series of innovations, each building on the last.  However, that story is incomplete without considering the many women who made significant contributions to the field.  For example, Grace Hopper is credited with developing the first compiler, a program that translates human-readable code into machine-readable code.  Hopper’s invention made it possible for programmers to use high-level languages, which are easier to understand and use than low-level languages.  What is the most likely reason why the author includes the example of Grace Hopper?',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Standard English Conventions']::text[],
    'random_id_2',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Standard English Conventions","section":"english"}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'Which choice best summarizes the author’s view of the steam engine’s impact on workers?',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"The steam engine had a mostly negative impact on workers, leading to widespread unemployment and a decrease in wages.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"The steam engine had a mostly positive impact on workers, leading to increased economic productivity and technological advancement.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"The steam engine had both positive and negative impacts on workers, resulting in widespread unemployment and a decrease in wages but also increased economic productivity and technological advancement.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"The steam engine had little impact on workers, as the introduction of steam-powered machinery did not significantly affect employment levels or wages.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'C',
    'The author acknowledges that the steam engine brought with it negative consequences for workers, particularly in the coal industry, but ultimately believes that its positive impacts outweighed its negative impacts.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'Although the invention of the steam engine revolutionized industry and transportation, it also brought with it significant consequences for workers, especially those in the coal industry. The introduction of steam-powered machinery meant that many jobs formerly done by hand could now be done by machines, leading to widespread unemployment and a decrease in wages. Workers had to adapt to new skills and new ways of working, or else face being left behind in the increasingly industrialized world.  In the long run, however, the invention of the steam engine ushered in an era of increased economic productivity and technological advancement, ultimately leading to a higher standard of living for many.',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Information and Ideas',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Information and Ideas',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Information and Ideas']::text[],
    'd764f3a8',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Information and Ideas","section":"english"}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"hail","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"hails","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"are hailing","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"have hailed","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'A',
    'The subject of the sentence is "The group of musicians." Since this is a singular subject, the verb must be singular. Thus, "hail" is the correct choice.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The group of musicians, known for their impressive harmonies and unique sound, ____ from all across the country.',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',

    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,

    'e9140d6d',

  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'The function of a thesis statement is to ',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"create a persuasive argument for the reader to agree with.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"provide a detailed explanation of the essay’s main points.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"sum up the essay’s main points and indicate the overall theme.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"introduce the essay’s topic and state the central idea.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'D',
    'The thesis statement is a summary of the essay''s main point, which is the overall idea of the essay. It is typically found at the end of the introduction.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The essay''s thesis statement is the most important part. It''s the central idea of the essay, and it''s what the entire essay is about. The thesis statement should be clearly stated, and it should be placed in the introduction. The thesis statement should be specific, and it should be arguable. A strong thesis statement can help to make the essay clear, focused, and persuasive. What is the function of a thesis statement?',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,

    'Standard English Conventions',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',

    '12d8c11d',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Standard English Conventions","section":"english"}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'The author uses anaphora in this excerpt to',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"contrast the speaker’s feelings and experiences.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"create a sense of rhythm and emphasis.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"emphasize the importance of the speaker’s message.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"suggest that the speaker is addressing a large audience.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'B',
    'The repeated word or phrase "The" at the beginning of successive clauses creates a sense of rhythm and emphasis, drawing attention to the beauty of nature.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The author of the essay uses a literary device called “anaphora,” which is the repetition of a word or phrase at the beginning of successive clauses, to create a sense of rhythm and emphasis. The repeated word or phrase is "The" in the following sentences: \"The sun is shining. The birds are singing. The flowers are blooming. The world is beautiful." Which choice correctly describes how the author uses anaphora?',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,

  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'The author suggests that people',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"often try to make unfamiliar situations more familiar and predictable to reduce mental chaos.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"are not comfortable with change and prefer to stick to the familiar.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"respond to unfamiliar situations in different ways, depending on their personality.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"are always looking for ways to reduce the level of mental chaos in their lives.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'A',
    'The author is describing the human need for order and predictability, which motivates people to try to make unfamiliar situations more familiar and predictable in order to reduce mental chaos. This is the most direct summary of the author''s main idea, as it captures the essence of the argument.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The author states that people are driven by a need to reduce the level of mental chaos caused by a situation or experience that is unfamiliar or unpredictable. The author then gives a specific example of this, which is when an individual is in an unfamiliar environment, surrounded by people who have different customs and traditions. The author suggests that the need to bring order to the experience is the main reason why the individual might act to make the new experience more familiar and predictable. Which of the following best summarizes the author''s main idea?',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Information and Ideas',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',

    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Information and Ideas']::text[],

  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'In the study described in this passage, the control plot was most likely included to',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"make sure that the new fertilizer was the only factor that contributed to the increase in crop yield.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"provide a baseline against which the results of the test plot could be compared.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"determine the average yield of crops in the area where the study was conducted.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"test the effectiveness of the fertilizer on a variety of different types of crops.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'B',
    'The control plot serves as a baseline to compare the results of the test plot.  By comparing the results of the test plot to the control plot, the researchers can more accurately determine whether the new fertilizer is actually responsible for the increase in crop yield.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The passage describes a study that was conducted to test the effects of a new type of fertilizer on crop growth.     'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"The study examined the effects of a new type of fertilizer on crop yield, and the researchers found that the new fertilizer was more effective than the traditional fertilizer, but it also had a negative impact on the soil quality.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"The study examined the effects of a new type of fertilizer on crop yield; the researchers found that the new fertilizer was more effective than the traditional fertilizer, but it also had a negative impact on the soil quality.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"The study examined the effects of a new type of fertilizer on crop yield, the researchers found that the new fertilizer was more effective than the traditional fertilizer, but it also had a negative impact on the soil quality,  they noted that the new fertilizer caused a decline in the levels of essential nutrients in the soil.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"The study examined the effects of a new type of fertilizer on crop yield; the researchers found that the new fertilizer was more effective than the traditional fertilizer, but it also had a negative impact on the soil quality; they noted that the new fertilizer caused a decline in the levels of essential nutrients in the soil.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,

    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',

    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
